name: Marinated Chicken and Pork
recipeIngredient: 3 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves - cut into 1" cubes
1 lb lean boneless pork - cut into 1" cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken pieces and pork cubes in a large bowl.
2. Mix all other ingredients thoroughly, pour over the chicken and pork.
3. Allow meat to marinate in sauce for about 2 hours or overnight in refrigerator.
4. Transfer chicken, pork and marinade to cooker.
5. Cover pot, turn on LOW and cook 6-8 hours or until chicken and pork are thoroughly cooked.
